aka: O Melhor Infarto da Minha Vida
The Best Heart Attack of My Life
this_title: El mejor infarto de mi vida
trans_title: O Melhor Infarto da Minha Vida
The Best Heart Attack of My Life
introduction: A ghostwriter's life-threatening heart attack in a foreign country forces him to rely on strangers for help. This unexpected crisis becomes a transformative experience, reshaping his perspective and impacting those around him.
foreign_title: El mejor infarto de mi vida
